careers.title: Journalist
careers.shortDescription: Report news and create content for media outlets.
careers.description: Journalists research, write, and report news stories for newspapers, magazines, television, and online platforms. They often specialize in areas such as politics, sports, or entertainment.

requirements.examDescription: Scholastic Assessment Test (SAT) or American College Testing (ACT)

pathway.title: High School Diploma
pathway.description: Complete high school with a focus on English, Literature, and Government.

pathway.title: Bachelor's Degree in Journalism
pathway.description: Earn a bachelor's degree in journalism or a related field.

pathway.title: Internship
pathway.description: Gain practical experience through internships at media outlets.

pathway.title: Entry-Level Position
pathway.description: Start as a reporter or correspondent at a local news outlet.

pathway.title: Advancement
pathway.description: Progress to roles such as editor, senior reporter, or news anchor.

careers.title: Lawyer
careers.shortDescription: Represent clients in legal matters and provide legal advice.
careers.description: Lawyers advise and represent individuals, businesses, and government agencies on legal issues and disputes. They specialize in areas such as criminal law, corporate law, or family law.

requirements.examDescription: Scholastic Assessment Test (SAT) or American College Testing (ACT)

pathway.title: High School Diploma
pathway.description: Complete high school with a focus on English, Government, and Economics.

pathway.title: Bachelor's Degree
pathway.description: Earn a bachelor's degree in any field, preferably pre-law or related.

pathway.title: Law School
pathway.description: Attend law school and earn a Juris Doctor (JD) degree.

pathway.title: Bar Exam
pathway.description: Pass the bar exam in the state where you wish to practice.

pathway.title: Entry-Level Position
pathway.description: Start as an associate at a law firm or in a legal department.

careers.title: Public Relations Specialist
careers.shortDescription: Manage the public image of organizations and individuals.
careers.description: Public Relations Specialists create and maintain a positive public image for their clients. They handle media relations, press releases, and social media strategies.

requirements.examDescription: Scholastic Assessment Test (SAT) or American College Testing (ACT)

pathway.title: High School Diploma
pathway.description: Complete high school with a focus on English, Literature, and Government.

pathway.title: Bachelor's Degree in Public Relations
pathway.description: Earn a bachelor's degree in public relations, communications, or a related field.

pathway.title: Internship
pathway.description: Gain practical experience through internships in PR firms or corporate communications departments.

pathway.title: Entry-Level Position
pathway.description: Start as a PR assistant or coordinator.

pathway.title: Advancement
pathway.description: Progress to roles such as PR manager or director.

careers.title: Writer
careers.shortDescription: Writers create content for books, articles, scripts, and other forms of media.
careers.description: Writers develop written content for various platforms, including books, magazines, websites, and films. They use their creativity and language skills to engage and inform audiences.

requirements.examDescription: General Certificate of Education Advanced Level (A-Levels)

pathway.title: Complete A-Levels
pathway.description: Focus on subjects like English, Literature, and Government.

pathway.title: Earn a Bachelor's Degree
pathway.description: Pursue a degree in English Literature, Creative Writing, or a related field.

pathway.title: Build a Portfolio
pathway.description: Write and publish your work to showcase your skills.

pathway.title: Network
pathway.description: Connect with publishers, editors, and other writers.

pathway.title: Publish and Promote
pathway.description: Publish your work and engage with your audience.

careers.title: Business Consultant
careers.shortDescription: Advise businesses on how to improve their operations and profitability.
careers.description: Business consultants analyze organizational practices, identify weaknesses, and recommend solutions to improve efficiency and profitability.

requirements.examDescription: General Certificate of Education Advanced Level (A-Levels)

pathway.title: Complete A-Levels
pathway.description: Focus on subjects like Mathematics and Economics.

pathway.title: Bachelor's Degree
pathway.description: Pursue a degree in Business Management or a related field.

pathway.title: Internship
pathway.description: Gain practical experience through internships.

pathway.title: Entry-Level Job
pathway.description: Start working as a junior consultant.

pathway.title: Certification
pathway.description: Obtain relevant certifications like CMC (Certified Management Consultant).

careers.title: Biomedical Scientist
careers.shortDescription: Conduct research and tests to help diagnose and treat diseases.
careers.description: Biomedical scientists conduct laboratory tests and research to help diagnose, treat, and prevent diseases. They work in hospitals, laboratories, and research institutions.

requirements.examDescription: General Certificate of Education Advanced Level (A-Levels)

pathway.title: Complete A-Levels
pathway.description: Focus on subjects like Biology and Chemistry.

pathway.title: Bachelor's Degree
pathway.description: Pursue a degree in Biomedical Science or a related field.

pathway.title: Internship
pathway.description: Gain practical experience through internships.

pathway.title: Entry-Level Job
pathway.description: Start working as a junior biomedical scientist.

pathway.title: Specialization
pathway.description: Specialize in a particular area of biomedical science.

careers.title: Physician
careers.shortDescription: Diagnose and treat illnesses to improve patient health.
careers.description: Physicians are medical doctors who diagnose and treat illnesses, injuries, and other health conditions. They work in hospitals, clinics, or private practices and often specialize in areas like pediatrics, cardiology, or surgery. This career requires extensive education and training but offers a rewarding opportunity to help others.

requirements.examDescription: Scholastic Assessment Test (SAT) or American College Testing (ACT)

pathway.title: Complete Undergraduate Degree
pathway.description: Earn a bachelor's degree with a focus on pre-medical studies.

pathway.title: Pass the MCAT
pathway.description: Prepare for and pass the Medical College Admission Test.

pathway.title: Attend Medical School
pathway.description: Complete medical school to earn an MD or DO degree.

pathway.title: Complete Residency
pathway.description: Gain hands-on training in a specialized field during residency.

pathway.title: Obtain Licensure
pathway.description: Pass licensing exams to practice medicine in your state.

careers.title: Marketing Manager
careers.shortDescription: Develop strategies to promote products and services.
careers.description: Marketing managers oversee campaigns to promote products or services. They analyze market trends, develop strategies, and manage teams to achieve business goals. This career combines creativity with analytical skills and is ideal for those interested in leadership and communication.

requirements.examDescription: Scholastic Assessment Test (SAT) or American College Testing (ACT)

pathway.title: Complete Undergraduate Degree
pathway.description: Earn a bachelor's degree in marketing, business, or a related field.

pathway.title: Gain Work Experience
pathway.description: Work in marketing roles to build skills and experience.

pathway.title: Pursue an MBA (Optional)
pathway.description: Enroll in a Master of Business Administration program for advanced knowledge.

pathway.title: Apply for Managerial Roles
pathway.description: Seek opportunities to lead marketing teams and campaigns.

pathway.title: Continue Professional Development
pathway.description: Stay updated on industry trends and certifications.

careers.title: Civil Engineer
careers.shortDescription: Design and oversee construction of infrastructure projects.
careers.description: Civil engineers plan, design, and supervise the construction of infrastructure projects like roads, bridges, and buildings. They ensure projects meet safety standards and are completed efficiently. This career is ideal for those who enjoy problem-solving and working on large-scale projects.

requirements.examDescription: Scholastic Assessment Test (SAT) or American College Testing (ACT)

universities.name: Massachusetts Institute of Technology
universities.programName: Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

pathway.title: Complete Undergraduate Degree
pathway.description: Earn a bachelor's degree in civil engineering.

pathway.title: Pass the FE Exam
pathway.description: Pass the Fundamentals of Engineering exam to become an Engineer-in-Training.

pathway.title: Gain Work Experience
pathway.description: Work under a licensed engineer to gain practical experience.

pathway.title: Pass the PE Exam
pathway.description: Pass the Principles and Practice of Engineering exam to become a licensed Professional Engineer.

pathway.title: Advance Your Career
pathway.description: Pursue advanced roles or specialize in areas like structural or environmental engineering.

careers.title: Biomedical Engineer
careers.shortDescription: Combine engineering principles with medical sciences to design healthcare equipment and devices.
careers.description: Biomedical engineers develop medical technologies like prosthetics, imaging systems, and artificial organs. They work in hospitals, research labs, or medical device companies.

requirements.examDescription: Scholastic Assessment Test (SAT) or American College Testing (ACT)

pathway.title: Bachelor's Degree
pathway.description: Study Biomedical Engineering or related field.

pathway.title: Internship
pathway.description: Gain hands-on experience in medical technology.

pathway.title: Certification (Optional)
pathway.description: Obtain professional engineering license.

pathway.title: Master's Degree (Optional)
pathway.description: Specialize in a subfield like biomechanics or medical imaging.

pathway.title: Career Advancement
pathway.description: Move into research, management, or entrepreneurship.

careers.title: Healthcare Administrator
careers.shortDescription: Manage healthcare facilities, ensuring efficient operations and quality patient care.
careers.description: Healthcare administrators oversee hospitals, clinics, or nursing homes, handling budgets, policies, and staff management.

requirements.examDescription: Scholastic Assessment Test (SAT) or American College Testing (ACT)

pathway.title: Bachelor's Degree
pathway.description: Study Health Administration or Business.

pathway.title: Entry-Level Position
pathway.description: Work in healthcare management roles.

pathway.title: Master's Degree
pathway.description: Earn MHA (Master of Health Administration).

pathway.title: Mid-Level Management
pathway.description: Lead departments or facilities.

pathway.title: Executive Role
pathway.description: Become hospital administrator or healthcare executive.

careers.title: Medical Writer
careers.shortDescription: Create clear, accurate content about medical topics for professionals or the public.
careers.description: Medical writers produce research papers, patient education materials, or pharmaceutical documents, bridging science and communication.

requirements.examDescription: Scholastic Assessment Test (SAT) or American College Testing (ACT)

pathway.title: Bachelor's Degree
pathway.description: Study Life Sciences or Journalism.

pathway.title: Writing Experience
pathway.description: Build portfolio with science writing.

pathway.title: Certification (Optional)
pathway.description: Obtain medical writing certification.

pathway.title: Specialization
pathway.description: Focus on regulatory, marketing, or educational writing.

pathway.title: Senior Roles
pathway.description: Lead writing teams or freelance.

careers.title: Medical Doctor
careers.shortDescription: Diagnose and treat illnesses, injuries, and other health conditions.
careers.description: Medical Doctors are healthcare professionals who diagnose and treat illnesses, injuries, and other health conditions. They work in hospitals, clinics, and private practices, providing care to patients and often collaborating with other healthcare professionals.

requirements.examDescription: Scholastic Assessment Test (SAT) or American College Testing (ACT)

pathway.title: Undergraduate Degree
pathway.description: Complete a bachelor's degree with a focus on pre-medical courses.

pathway.title: Medical School
pathway.description: Attend medical school to earn an MD or DO degree.

pathway.title: Residency
pathway.description: Complete a residency program in a chosen specialty.

pathway.title: Licensing
pathway.description: Pass the licensing exams to practice medicine.

pathway.title: Fellowship (Optional)
pathway.description: Specialize further with a fellowship in a sub-specialty.

careers.title: Business Development Manager
careers.shortDescription: Drive business growth by identifying new opportunities and building relationships.
careers.description: Business Development Managers analyze market trends, develop strategies to expand business operations, and negotiate deals with clients and partners.

requirements.examDescription: Scholastic Assessment Test (SAT) or American College Testing (ACT)

pathway.title: Bachelor's Degree
pathway.description: Earn a degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or related field.

pathway.title: Entry-Level Position
pathway.description: Gain experience in sales, marketing, or consulting.

pathway.title: MBA (Optional)
pathway.description: Pursue a Master's in Business Administration for advanced roles.

pathway.title: Mid-Level Management
pathway.description: Progress to roles like Business Development Associate.

pathway.title: Senior Leadership
pathway.description: Advance to Director or VP of Business Development.

careers.title: Clinical Psychologist
careers.shortDescription: Assess and treat mental, emotional, and behavioral disorders.
careers.description: Clinical Psychologists diagnose psychological issues, provide therapy, and develop treatment plans. They work in hospitals, private practices, or research settings.

requirements.examDescription: Scholastic Assessment Test (SAT) or American College Testing (ACT)

pathway.title: Bachelor's Degree
pathway.description: Study Psychology or a related field.

pathway.title: Master's Degree
pathway.description: Earn a Master's in Clinical Psychology or related discipline.

pathway.title: Doctorate (PhD/PsyD)
pathway.description: Complete a doctoral program in Clinical Psychology.

pathway.title: Internship
pathway.description: Gain supervised clinical experience.

pathway.title: Licensing
pathway.description: Pass the state licensing exam to practice independently.

careers.title: Financial Analyst
careers.shortDescription: Analyse financial data to guide business investment decisions.
careers.description: Financial analysts assess market trends, company performance, and economic conditions to provide investment recommendations. They work in banks, corporations, or investment firms, helping clients or employers make informed financial decisions.

requirements.examDescription: General Certificate of Education Advanced Level (A-Levels)

pathway.title: A-Levels
pathway.description: Complete A-Levels in Mathematics, Economics, and Business Studies.

pathway.title: Undergraduate Degree
pathway.description: Earn a degree in finance, economics, or business.

pathway.title: Internship
pathway.description: Gain experience through internships in financial firms.

pathway.title: Professional Certification
pathway.description: Obtain certifications like CFA or ACCA.

pathway.title: Specialisation
pathway.description: Focus on areas like equity research or portfolio management.

careers.title: Management Consultant
careers.shortDescription: Advise businesses on strategies to improve efficiency and profitability.
careers.description: Management Consultants work with organisations to solve complex problems, improve performance, and maximise growth. They analyse business practices and recommend changes to enhance efficiency and profitability.

requirements.examDescription: General Certificate of Education Advanced Level (A-Levels)

pathway.title: Complete A-Levels
pathway.description: Focus on Mathematics, Economics, and English.

pathway.title: Earn a Bachelor's Degree
pathway.description: Obtain a degree in Business Management, Economics, or a related field.

pathway.title: Gain Work Experience
pathway.description: Work in a business or finance-related role to gain experience.

pathway.title: Pursue a Master's Degree
pathway.description: Consider a Master's in Business Administration (MBA) for advanced knowledge.

pathway.title: Join a Consultancy Firm
pathway.description: Start your career as a Management Consultant at a consultancy firm.

careers.title: Graphic Designer
careers.shortDescription: Create visual concepts to communicate ideas through art and design.
careers.description: Graphic Designers use creativity and technology to produce designs for print, digital media, and advertising. They work with clients to develop visual solutions that convey messages effectively. This career is ideal for those who enjoy combining art with technology.

requirements.examDescription: West African Senior School Certificate Examination (WASSCE) or NECO

pathway.title: Complete Secondary Education
pathway.description: Focus on English, Literature, and Fine Arts.

pathway.title: Pass WAEC/NECO and JAMB
pathway.description: Achieve required scores in relevant subjects.

pathway.title: Earn a Bachelor's Degree
pathway.description: Study Fine and Applied Arts or Graphic Design at a recognized university.

pathway.title: Build a Portfolio
pathway.description: Showcase your design work to potential employers.

pathway.title: Gain Work Experience
pathway.description: Work as an intern or freelancer to build your career.

careers.title: Human Resources Manager
careers.shortDescription: Oversee recruitment, employee relations, and workplace policies in organizations.
careers.description: HR managers handle hiring, training, employee benefits, and conflict resolution. They ensure compliance with labor laws and foster a positive work environment.

requirements.examDescription: West African Senior School Certificate Examination (WASSCE) or NECO

pathway.title: Complete Secondary Education
pathway.description: Obtain WAEC/NECO with credits in relevant subjects.

pathway.title: Pass JAMB/Post-UTME
pathway.description: Take JAMB and university-specific entrance exams.

pathway.title: Earn a Bachelor's Degree
pathway.description: Study Business Administration or Human Resources.

pathway.title: Entry-Level HR Role
pathway.description: Gain experience in recruitment or employee relations.

pathway.title: Advance to Management
pathway.description: Pursue certifications (e.g., CIPM) and lead HR departments.

careers.title: Corporate Lawyer
careers.shortDescription: Specialize in legal matters related to businesses, including contracts, mergers, and compliance.
careers.description: Corporate lawyers provide legal advice to businesses on issues such as contracts, mergers, acquisitions, regulatory compliance, and corporate governance. They ensure companies operate within the law and help resolve disputes.

requirements.examDescription: West African Senior School Certificate Examination (WASSCE) or NECO

pathway.title: Complete secondary education
pathway.description: Obtain WAEC/NECO with credits in relevant subjects.

pathway.title: Study Law (LL.B)
pathway.description: Earn a bachelor's degree in law from an accredited university.

pathway.title: Attend Law School
pathway.description: Complete the Nigerian Law School program and pass the bar exam.

pathway.title: Gain experience in corporate law
pathway.description: Work in a law firm or corporate legal department specializing in business law.

pathway.title: Advance to senior roles
pathway.description: Become a partner in a law firm or lead a corporate legal team.

careers.title: Public Health Specialist
careers.shortDescription: Work to improve community health through education, policy, and research.
careers.description: Public health specialists focus on preventing diseases and promoting health in communities. They work in government agencies, NGOs, or research institutions.

requirements.examDescription: West African Senior School Certificate Examination (WASSCE) or NECO

universities.name: University of Nigeria, Nsukka
universities.programName: Bachelor of Science in Public Health

pathway.title: Complete WAEC/NECO
pathway.description: Pass with credits in Biology, Chemistry, Mathematics, English, and Social Sciences.

pathway.title: Pass JAMB
pathway.description: Score high in JAMB with Biology, Chemistry, Mathematics, and English.

pathway.title: Gain admission to university
pathway.description: Complete a 4-year B.Sc. in Public Health.

pathway.title: Complete internship
pathway.description: Gain practical experience in a public health setting.

pathway.title: Obtain certification
pathway.description: Register with the Public Health Association of Nigeria (PHAN).

careers.title: Data Scientist
careers.shortDescription: Analyse complex data to extract insights and drive decision-making
careers.description: Data Scientists use statistical analysis, machine learning, and programming to interpret large datasets. They solve complex problems across industries like finance, healthcare, and technology.

requirements.examDescription: General Certificate of Education Advanced Level (A-Levels)

pathway.title: A-Levels
pathway.description: Study Mathematics, Further Mathematics, and relevant science subjects

pathway.title: Bachelor's Degree
pathway.description: Pursue a degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Mathematics, or related field

pathway.title: Internships
pathway.description: Gain practical experience through internships or research projects

pathway.title: Master's Degree (Optional)
pathway.description: Specialise further with a postgraduate degree in Data Science or AI

pathway.title: Professional Certification
pathway.description: Obtain certifications like Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Scientist or Google Data Analytics

careers.title: Robotics Engineer
careers.shortDescription: Design and build robotic systems for industrial, medical, or consumer applications
careers.description: Robotics Engineers combine mechanical, electrical, and computer engineering to create automated systems. They work in manufacturing, healthcare, aerospace, and emerging tech fields.

requirements.examDescription: General Certificate of Education Advanced Level (A-Levels)

pathway.title: A-Levels
pathway.description: Study Mathematics, Physics, and preferably Design Technology or Electronics

pathway.title: Bachelor's Degree
pathway.description: Complete an accredited engineering degree with robotics specialisation

pathway.title: Industrial Placement
pathway.description: Gain practical experience through a sandwich year or summer internships

pathway.title: Chartered Engineer (CEng)
pathway.description: Work towards professional accreditation with the IET or IMechE

pathway.title: Specialisation
pathway.description: Focus on areas like medical robotics, autonomous vehicles, or industrial automation

careers.title: Patent Examiner
careers.shortDescription: Assess patent applications to determine if inventions are new and innovative
careers.description: Patent Examiners combine technical expertise with legal knowledge to evaluate patent applications. They work for intellectual property offices, ensuring inventions meet criteria for novelty and industrial applicability.

requirements.examDescription: General Certificate of Education Advanced Level (A-Levels)

pathway.title: A-Levels
pathway.description: Study STEM subjects plus English for communication skills

pathway.title: Bachelor's Degree
pathway.description: Complete a technical degree in engineering, physics, or life sciences

pathway.title: Postgraduate Qualification
pathway.description: Consider a law conversion course or IP postgraduate certificate

pathway.title: UKIPO Training
pathway.description: Complete the patent examiner training programme

pathway.title: Professional Development
pathway.description: Maintain technical expertise in your specialist field
